question: Can a user with 7 purchases on their account combine shipments?
doc_correct: Users must have completed at least 10 purchases to be eligible for combined shipping.
doc_wrong: Users must have completed at least 5 purchases to be eligible for combined shipping.

question: Is a user with 90 days of account age eligible to bid on restricted items?
doc_correct: Users must have an account age of at least 180 days to bid on restricted items.
doc_wrong: Users must have an account age of at least 60 days to bid on restricted items.

question: Can a user with a seller rating of 12 access bulk listing tools?
doc_correct: A minimum seller rating of 25 is required to access bulk listing tools.
doc_wrong: A minimum seller rating of 10 is required to access bulk listing tools.

question: Is a user with 3 disputes in the last 6 months allowed to use fixed-price listings?
doc_correct: Users with more than 2 disputes in the last 6 months are not allowed to use fixed-price listings.
doc_wrong: Users with more than 4 disputes in the last 6 months are not allowed to use fixed-price listings.

question: Can a user who joined 40 days ago leave seller feedback?
doc_correct: Users must have an account age of at least 30 days to leave seller feedback.
doc_wrong: Users must have an account age of at least 60 days to leave seller feedback.

question: Can an unverified user with 20 purchases combine shipments?
doc_correct: Users must have a verified account and at least 10 purchases to combine shipments.
doc_wrong: Users must have at least 10 purchases to combine shipments. Account verification is not required.

question: Is a verified user with a suspended payment method eligible for express checkout?
doc_correct: Users must have a verified account and an active payment method to use express checkout.
doc_wrong: Users must have a verified account to use express checkout.

question: Can a user with a verified account but no purchase history bid on high-value items?
doc_correct: Bidding on high-value items requires a verified account and at least 5 completed purchases.
doc_wrong: Bidding on high-value items requires only a verified account.

question: Is a user with an unverified email but 15 purchases allowed to sell internationally?
doc_correct: International selling requires a verified email address and at least 10 completed purchases.
doc_wrong: International selling requires at least 10 completed purchases.

question: Can a user with a verified account, 20 purchases, and no disputes access sponsored listings?
doc_correct: Sponsored listings are available to users with a verified account, at least 10 purchases, and no open disputes.
doc_wrong: Sponsored listings are available to users with at least 10 purchases and no open disputes.

question: Can a standard user download transaction reports in bulk?
doc_correct: Bulk transaction report downloads are restricted to premium Seller accounts only.
doc_wrong: Bulk transaction report downloads are available to all registered users.

question: Is a buyer with no seller history allowed to create a storefront?
doc_correct: Creating a storefront requires at least 1 completed sale as a seller.
doc_wrong: Any registered user can create a storefront regardless of seller history.

question: Can a user with a 30-day-old account and 8 purchases use the backup buyer offer feature?
doc_correct: The backup buyer offer feature requires an account age of at least 90 days and 10 completed purchases.
doc_wrong: The backup buyer offer feature requires an account age of at least 30 days and 5 completed purchases.

question: Is a user eligible for fee discounts if they have been a member for 2 years but have a feedback score of 8?
doc_correct: Fee discounts require a membership of at least 1 year and a feedback score of at least 20.
doc_wrong: Fee discounts require a membership of at least 2 years and a feedback score of at least 5.

question: Can a user with a verified account, 2-year membership, and feedback score of 30 access early sale promotions?
doc_correct: Early sale promotions require a verified account, at least 1 year of membership, and a feedback score of 25 or more.
doc_wrong: Early sale promotions require a verified account and at least 3 years of membership.
